title: Molo shrub
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Molo shrubs''' grew in the shade on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They could be found in the canyons of the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]]. During the day, the [[Plant/Legends|shrub]] resembled a simple scrub bush, however during the night time, the shrub erupted with leaves and flowers.
